McDonald's is unique. Its fast food franchise has taken the world by storm (for a long time now) and its "tasteful" uniqueness and wide moat is reflected in its projected operating margins of around 50%. This margin expansion projection, from the current 40–45%, is also linked to expectations that the company may be able to use AI to improve its efficiency and increase its margins in the process.
